joint_null_patch_audit.interpretation: The current joint-null validator uses to_numpy(copy=True), fixing the read-only NumPy assignment crash. Progress logging was also added. This is a technical fix, not a methodology relaxation.
required_repair: Backup may be deleted only after audit state is committed and .gitignore covers backup patterns.

source_panel_patch_audit.interpretation: The current source-panel anomaly runner treats missing/None/False plugin_expansion_allowed as blocked. This did not enable candidates/release/runtime/capital/live, and the route later failed deep validation. However, using missing/None to satisfy plugin readiness can hide schema omissions. Future modules must separate action safety from readiness validation.
required_repair: Future plugin readiness requires explicit field presence.
Missing safety flag means action blocked, but schema not ready.
Do not re-run closed source-panel anomaly route.
